first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning in both evaluations is nearly identical. Both focus on the same core skill gaps: a critical lack of C++ experience and no evidence of platform engineering leadership, which are the central requirements of the role. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce new concepts or critiques tied to the demographic change.
